{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324005600E8755C4CD91B81508581"}"},"total":58},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598950443549229849","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看！！推荐大家看最新的世界盗墓笔记这个位面！！爽的要死，大黄丫头很满意[害羞]","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":17,"text":"盗墓笔记","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%9B%97%E5%A2%93%E7%AC%94%E8%AE%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177428496181508581%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227598950443549229849%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227567011242053733401%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%9B%97%E5%A2%93%E7%AC%94%E8%AE%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769271328,"group_id":"7567011242053733401","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"男主必须身心全洁，最讨厌左右摇摆的贱男人！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3t5N4dTYqi98QJ1hj+iQRE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/174bddb6dc814d64b5fe912be360d8dd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882722&x-signature=oBN4BIp1DIhRyQ%2FcmeJJmm%2BqHEA%3D","user_id":"492993566475517","user_name":"厌腐厌副cp厌虐女"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"492993566475517","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":7,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7567011242053733401","book_info":{"abstract":"（男主有不洁，洁党慎入，强制爱比较多，当然也有甜甜恋爱，作者想啥写啥，普女，万男迷，美男都喜欢女主，男主触碰到女主就会爱上她，秒变恋爱脑，剧情精彩，入股不亏，看肖奈为爱做三，秒变阴湿男鬼小三，张启山抢夺人妻，暮光之城，父子修罗场，宁安如梦三男主修罗场，男主不洁，不洁，不洁，介意慎入，有很多有妇之夫，妻妾成群的男主对女主强制爱，女主不爱他们，他们对女主爱而不得，发狂，卑微求爱。）
普通女孩苏彤彤穿越后，总是会被各路男神纠缠，这让她非常苦恼。
第一个世界:二月红
第二个世界:马文才
第三个世界:张启山
第四个世界:润玉
第五个世界:肖奈
第六个世界:爱德华，卡莱尔
第七个世界:宁安如梦（张遮，燕临，谢危。）
第八个世界:临江仙
第九个世界:莲花楼
第十个世界:逐玉
哈利波特，绝代双骄，甄嬛传，步步惊心，玉骨遥，少年白马醉春风，兰陵王，绝世双娇，藏海传，步步惊心，如懿传，风云雄霸天下，云之羽，长相思，宁安如梦，妈妈为我嫁，陆小凤，楚留香原随云，武林外史，大唐双龙传，东宫，四大名捕，苍兰决，三生三世十里桃花，三生三世枕上书，小李飞刀，雪花女神龙，逆水寒顾惜朝，金蚕丝雨傅玉书，临江仙，皇太子秘","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/42ec7ce4624e4e22eb51ffdccf3d251b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"红豆相南国","author_id":"","book_id":"7567011242053733401","book_name":"综影视：普女又被男主们强制爱了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7567020628805435929","read_count":"46385","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"471707"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"208","tags":"女频衍生,团宠,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/95ad25528a528877f2358fa0df1fe859~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779468961&x-signature=Tej79bFXlJgg4egL8upL%2FTkNrRc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3773997151695815","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"108"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324005600E8755C4CD91B81508581"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"
